news.t: Pacer ETFs Factor Series Crosses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management

holdings.infoBox: PALC is an equity ETF with a total of 180 individual holdings. The top holdings are Lam Research stock at 3.14%, KLA Corporation at 2.70%, Applied Materials at 2.35%, Apple at 2.11%, and GE Aerospace at 2.10%.

overview.description: The Pacer Lunt Large Cap Multi-Factor Alternator ETF (PALC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund invests in US large cap equities that allocates to multi-factor sub-indices based on relative strength. PALC was launched on Jun 24, 2020 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Lunt Capital U.S. Large Cap Multi-Factor Rotation Index

data.title: Pacer ETFs Factor Series Crosses $1 Billion in Assets Under Management
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs (“Pacer”), an ETF provider that offers strategy-driven, rules-based ETFs, announces the Pacer Factor ETF Series (“Factor series”) has surpassed $1 billion in ...
